items.prompt: Fixed I/O pads are handled most directly by…
items.explain: Terminals pin nodes to parts and shape legal cuts.

items.prompt: KL and FM improve an existing bipartition under a balance rule.
items.explain: They move or swap nodes to reduce cut while staying legal.

items.prompt: A natural next course after partitioning is…
items.explain: Those courses reuse cut, balance, and multilevel instincts.
